headline: Here’s What Analysts Are Saying About Zoetis Inc. (ZTS)
summary: Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) is one of the best healthcare stocks to buy with highest upside potential. Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) received a rating update from Stifel on May 22. headline: Zoetis Lenivia Approval Tests Companion Animal Growth And Legal Concerns
summary: Zoetis (NYSE:ZTS) has received UK approval for Lenivia, a long acting monoclonal antibody therapy for osteoarthritis pain in dogs. The decision expands the company's monoclonal antibody portfolio in its Companion Animal segment. Lenivia is expected to be introduced to UK veterinarians as a new option for managing canine osteoarthritis pain. Zoetis enters this news cycle with its shares at $78.82 and multi year returns under pressure, including a decline of 55.1% over the past five years and...

headline: Is IDEXX Laboratories Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: IDEXX Laboratories has trailed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, and analysts are fairly bullish on its future growth potential.

headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks on Our Watchlist and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.
